creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to tesu from comment #0)
It looks like you have:

AMD RS880 [Radeon HD 4290]

https://www.pcilookup.com/?ven=1002&dev=9714&action=submit

What is the output of 'pkg info | grep drm'?
And 'kldstat -v', too.

I see this in your dmesg:

May 11 18:33:44 taiyou kernel: Loading kernel modules:
May 11 18:33:44 taiyou kernel: info: [drm] Initialized drm 1.1.0 20060810
May 11 18:33:44 taiyou kernel: drmn0: =======================================================
May 11 18:33:44 taiyou kernel: drmn0: This code is deprecated.  Install the graphics/drm-kmod pkg
May 11 18:33:44 taiyou kernel: drmn0: =======================================================
May 11 18:33:44 taiyou kernel: drmn0: Deprecated code (to be removed in FreeBSD 13): drm2 drivers
May 11 18:33:44 taiyou kernel: drmn0: =======================================================
May 11 18:33:44 taiyou kernel: drmn0: This code is deprecated.  Install the graphics/drm-kmod pkg
May 11 18:33:44 taiyou kernel: drmn0: =======================================================
May 11 18:33:44 taiyou kernel: drmn0: Deprecated code (to be removed in FreeBSD 13): drm2 drivers

On my 12.x systems, I have graphics/drm-fbsd12.0-kmod
